name.description: names can be hierarchical using slashes (e.g. "prod-variables/hostname").

parent.description: variable. * `text` or `value` - (Required) The content to associate with the variable. Exactly one of `text` or `variable` must be specified. If `text` is specified, it must be a valid UTF-8 string and less than 4096 bytes in length. If `value` is specified, it must be base64 encoded and less than 4096 bytes in length. - - -

project.description: is not provided, the provider project is used.
